title: Vanilla SkyGrid
description: Minecraft challenge to survive in a grid world
body:

## Overview

Can you survive when the entire world is transformed into an infinite grid dimension?
The Minecraft Grid Challenge reshapes the Overworld, Nether, and End into endless grids of blocks suspended in space. Every step counts—misplace a block or take a wrong jump, and you could fall into the void forever.

This is the ultimate survival test, combining skill, creativity, and raw determination.

## Features

All dimensions are grids – Overworld, Nether, and End generate as infinite floating block grids.

Resource scarcity – Every block mined matters; no easy caves or biomes.
